modmenu.summaryTranslation.jukebox_loopi: Orders Barrel Organs t' play yer Shanties on repeat!
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.jukebox_l:
Orders Barrel Organs t' play yer Shanties on repeat!

They won't repeat yer Shanties when part o' contraptions.

Block tags can order yer Barrel Organs abou' further.
